account_removed: 🗑 Account unlinked from your Telegram chat.
admin_stats_text: 📊 Bot stats • Linked accounts: %d • Active packages: %d • Pending requests: %d • Awaiting payment: %d • Uploaded receipts: %d
admin_welcome: 🛡 Admin Panel — %s You are logged in as the administrator. Use the buttons below to manage bot requests and monitor activity.
already_linked: ℹ️ This account is already linked to your Telegram chat.
ask_message: 💬 Add an optional note for the admin, or send /skip to continue without one:
ask_password: 🔒 Now send your VPN password (it will be deleted from the chat right after):
ask_receipt: 🧾 Please send the payment receipt as a photo.
ask_username_new: 📝 Pick a username for your new account (3–32 chars, letters, digits, _ - .):
auth_locked: 🔒 Your account is locked. Please contact the administrator.
bot_disabled: ⚠️ The bot is currently disabled by the administrator. Please try again later.
help_text: Bot help Commands: • /start — open the main menu • /help — show this help • /settings — bot settings • /language — change language • /cancel — cancel the current operation Use the inline buttons to manage your VPN accounts, view usage, request renewals, order new accounts and upload payment receipts.
linked_locked_hint: 🔒 This account is currently locked (quota exhausted or expired). Open My Accounts and tap Renew to request a renewal.
low_quota_warning: 🔔 Low quota warning for %s: only %d MB remaining. Please consider renewing.
main_menu: 📋 Main menu What would you like to do?
no_accounts: 📭 You have not linked any accounts yet. Use Add Account from the main menu.
no_packages: 📦 No packages are available right now. Please try again later.
not_approved_yet: ℹ️ Your request is not approved yet — you cannot upload a receipt right now.
not_linked: ❓ Account is not linked to your Telegram chat.
only_photo: 📷 Please send the receipt as a photo.
rate_limited: 🚦 Too many attempts. Please wait a minute and try again.
request_created: 📨 Your request was submitted. The administrator will review it shortly.
request_exists: ⏳ You already have a pending request. Please wait until it is processed.
session_timed_out: ⌛ Session timed out. Please try again from the main menu.
unknown_command: 🤔 Unknown command. Use the menu buttons.
welcome: 👋 Welcome to %s. Here you can: • 🔗 Link an existing VPN account • 📊 Check usage and expiry • 🔄 Request a renewal • 🆕 Order a brand-new account • 🔔 Get notified when your traffic runs low
